ddls:
CREATE TABLE "urban_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban feature */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the feature */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the feature */,
  "distance_to_nearest_metro" REAL /* Distance from the feature to the nearest metro station */,
  "convenience_store_count" REAL /* Number of convenience stores near the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of urban feature (e.g., metro station, convenience store, park) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the feature */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the feature */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the feature is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the feature is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., urban planning, transportation) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user (e.g., city government, private company) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the feature (e.g., planning, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_access_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES urban_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_updates_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES urban_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., feature analysis, user activity) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_categories_bridge" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id", "category_id")
)
